channel.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence

  • Halite by Two Sigma - Collect the halite during a match in space.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Gym OpenAI - Game toolkit for reinforcement learning algorithms.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence

  • CyberBattleSimstars1.2k - Experimentation platform to investigate automated agents. Website.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Sep 14th - Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Dataset

  • CartolaFC - Popular brazilian fantasy football (from 2014 to 2017).

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Sep 7th - Sep 13th, 2020
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence

Mobile

  • Habiticastars867 - Gamify your life.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Dataset

  • Animal Crossing New Horizons NookPlaza Catalog - Comprehensive inventory of items, villagers, clothing, fish/bugs etc.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Apr 20th - Apr 26th, 2020
item.description:
Books

  • Drachen, A. Mirza-Babaei, P. Nacke, L. (2018). Games user research. Oxford.
  • El-Nasr, S. Drachen, A. Canossa, A. (2013). Game analytics: maximizing the value of player data. Sprigner.
  • Han, J., Pei, J., Kamber, M. (2011). Data mining: concepts and techniques. Elsevier.
  • Hennig-Thurau, T. Houston, M. (2018). Entertainment science: data analytics and practical theory for movies, games, music and books. Springer.
  • Loh, A. Sheng, Y. Ifenthaler, D. (2015). Serious games analytics: methodologies for performance measurement, assessment, and improvement. Springer.
  • Russell, S. J., Norvig, P. (2016). Artificial intelligence: a modern approach. Malaysia; Pearson Education Limited.
  • Yannakakis, G. N., Togelius, J. (2018). Artificial intelligence and games. Springer.

    • Dataset

  • 380,000 Guesses Dataset - Higher or Lower? - Real-world game data of guessing a number.
  • League of Legends Diamond Ranked Games (10 min) - Classify ranked games.

    • Market Research

  • Euro-Monitor, Video Games - Strategic Market Researcher.
  • Grand View Research, Digital Media - Syndicated market research studies.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Market Research

  • Newzoo - View on the games market. Unparalleled insights and value.
  • Statista, Video Games - Market and opinion research institutes and data derived from the economic sector.

    • API

  • OpenCritic - Game reviews aggregator.
  • WhatoPlay - Game reviews and ratings aggregator, and a recommender for discovering games.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Nov 25th - Dec 1st, 2019
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence

  • Wargusstars187 - Real-time strategy game. Website.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Nov 4th - Nov 10th, 2019
item.description:
Dataset

  • 17K Mobile Strategy Games - Strategy games from the Apple App Store.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Oct 7th - Oct 13th, 2019
item.description:
Dataset

  • The Quick, Draw! Datasetstars4.2k - Collection of 50 million drawings across 345 categories.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Sep 23rd - Sep 29th, 2019
item.description:
API

  • Marvel Developer - Information about Marvel's vast library of comics.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Sep 16th - Sep 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Dataset

  • Heroes of Might and Magic 3 Units - Units of a game.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Sep 9th - Sep 15th, 2019
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence

  • openmw - Open-world RPG game. Website.
  • Vegan on a Desert Island - Adventure game on island survival.
  • veloren - Sandbox game. Website.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Awesome Gamedevstars1.4k - Collection of open-source games.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Jul 22nd - Jul 28th, 2019
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence

  • Game Data Mining Competition - Competition of prediction of the players' behavior. Paper.
  • Morai-Maker-Enginestars15 - Cooperative game level editor. Paper.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Jul 15th - Jul 21st, 2019
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence

  • The Open Racing Car Simulator - Car racing simulator.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Jul 1st - Jul 7th, 2019
item.description:
Dataset

  • bravefrontier_datastars63 - Mobile game data, items and missions information.
  • GTA-3D Datasetstars74 - 2D and 3D images from Grand Theft Auto 5 game.

    • Dataset

    Related

  • Steam Game Datastars22 - Combination of Steam API and Steam Spy.
  • Steam Review Datasetsstars29 - Steam user reviews.

    • Miscellaneous

  • datasets-gamesstars5 - Datasets from a variety of games.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets May 27th - Jun 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • GitHub Activity Data - Activity from open source GitHub repositories.
  • Kaggle - Data Science competitions, datasets and projects.
  • Reddit - Datasets - Forum of datasets.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets May 13th - May 19th, 2019
item.description:
Dataset

  • SMMnet - Network data from Super Mario Maker.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets May 6th - May 12th, 2019
item.description:
API

  • IGDB - General information of games from any platform.
  • Riot Games - Active games, match history, and ranked statistics.
  • TGDBstars124 - General information of games from any platform. Website.
  • Xbox LIVE API - Games, apps, users stats and messages. Website, paper.

    • Artificial Intelligence

  • AI Birds - Artificial intelligence competition.
  • Angry Bots - Shooting game against robots.
  • Daimonin - Isometric MMORPG.
  • Deliantra - Adventure game in a medieval environment.
  • Dungeon Crawl: Stone Soupstars1.5k - Roguelike adventure.
  • Fighting Game AI Competition - Controller for a fighting game.
  • FlightGear Flight Simulator - Flight simulator.
  • General Video Game AI - Controller for general video game playing. Paper.
  • Hanabi Competition - Board game competition.
  • Hearthstone AI - Card game competition.
  • Infinite Mario Bros - Super Mario competition. Platformer AI antecedent. Website.
  • Malmostars3.7k - Platform built on top of Minecraft game.
  • microRTSstars189 - RTS game competition. PT-BRstars5.
  • Ms. Pac-Man - Pac-Man game competition. Website.
  • OpenLieroX - Liero (similar to Worms) game.
  • Platformer AI - Super Mario competition.
  • qenginestars761 - Retro game engine.
  • Retro Conteststars2.4k - Competition on SEGA Genesis games. Website.
  • Showdown AI Competitionstars14 - Competition of Pokemon battle. Website, paper.
  • StarCraft AI Competition - StarCraft game competition.
  • Text-Based Adventure AI Competitionstars27 - Text-adventure game competition. Website.
  • The Genius - Chess engine.
  • Visual Doom AI Competitionstars1.2k - Doom game competition. Website.

    • Artificial Intelligence

    Mobile

  • Pixel Dungeonstars2.8k - Roguelike game.
  • Shattered Pixel Dungeonstars1.1k - Improved Pixel Dungeon.

    • Artificial Intelligence

    Web

  • Infinite Mario Brosstars412 - Super Mario Bros. Play.
  • Onslaught! Arenastars175 - Fight off hordes of medieval monsters. Play.
  • TapAIstars0 - User interactions with a tap on screen game. Play.

    • Dataset

  • (LoL) League of Legends Ranked Games - Matches details from ranked games.
  • 2018 FIFA World Cup Squads - Squad details for teams participating in the World Cup.
  • Board Game Data - Data from board games.
  • Board Games Dataset - Attributes and the ratings from board games in BoardGameGeek.
  • Boardgaming Online Game Records - Playthroughs of board games.
  • Clash of Clans app store user comments - User reviews from Google Play and iTunes App Store.
  • Complete FIFA 2017 Player dataset (Global) - Players data.
  • Condensing Steam: Distilling the Diversity of Gamer Behavior - Temporal games data.
  • Connect-4 Data Set - Connect-4 game matches.
  • CS:GO Competitive Matchmaking Data - Damage entries on rounds played.
  • Defense of the Ancients - Monsters data from Warcraft III game.
  • Dota 2 Games (UCI) - Matches results.
  • Fortnite Statistics_80 Games - End games statistics.
  • History of Hearthstone - Collection of decks.
  • League of Legends Summoner Ids and Data - 2016 - Game data.
  • OpenDota - Continuous database of Dota 2 matches.
  • Path of exile game statistic - Players data.
  • Platform Experience Dataset - Super Mario Bros matches. Paper.
  • Pokémon GO Pokédexstars100 - Encyclopedia Pokemon.
  • Pokemon Wonder Trade Results - Results of wonder trades in Pokemon Moon version.
  • PokemonGO - Pokemon and battle stats.
  • Scrabblestars0 - Data Quackle game matches.
  • Starcraft: Scouting The Enemy - Player reconnaissance in professional-level.
  • StarCraft 2 (UCI) - Data stream of matches. Paper.
  • StarCraft II Replay Analysis - Aggregation of the replays.
  • The Complete Pokemon Dataset - Pokemon data from all generations.
  • World of Warcraft Avatar History - Collection of records. Website.

    • Dataset

    Related

  • Google Play Store Apps - Data from Play Store apps.
  • JVC Game Reviews - Video game data from JeuxVideo.com.
  • Kickstarter Datasets - Projects details.
  • Metacritic games - Games data from metacritc.
  • Over 13,000 Steam Games - Prices of video games from Steam.
  • PEW-Gaming-Broadband - Questions about video games.
  • Steam Video Games - Steam user interactions.
  • Vandal Game Reviews - Game data from Vandal.com.
  • Video Game DATA - Video games released.
  • Video Game Sales - Sales data from games.
  • Video Games Sales 2019 - Sales and scores for games.
  • World Top 100 Countries by Game Revenues - Global game revenue.
  • Video Games Review - Reviews on JeuxVideo.com.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Academic Torrents - Sharing enormous datasets.
  • Awesome ACGstars767 - Technologies related to anime, comic and games.
  • Games of Codingstars1.3k - Games to teach programming language.
  • Games on GitHubstars17.9k - Popular videos games hosted in GitHub.
  • Libre Game Wiki - Free gaming encyclopedia.
  • Open-source games - Open-source games (PT-BR).
  • UCI - Datasets.
  • Yahoo! Datasets - Datasets.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Apr 29th - May 5th, 2019
item.description:
API

  • Battle.net - Collection of games developed by Blizzard.
  • EVE Online - Science fiction massively multiplayer online game.

    • Artificial Intelligence

  • MiniDungeons - Procedural dungeon-like game.
  • polyworldstars137 - Artificial life system.

    • Dataset

  • dnddatastars55 - Dataset of Dungeons and Dragons characters.

    • Miscellaneous

  • data.world - Datasets.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Apr 15th - Apr 21st, 2019
item.description:
Dataset

  • StarDatastars549 - Matches, videos, etc. Website, paper.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
API

  • Battlefield 4 Stats - Stats, rankings, and progression of a player.
  • Giant Bomb - Game data and players review.
  • PandaScore - Realtime eSports data.
  • smm-course-searchstars3 - Search courses from Super Mario Maker game.
  • smm-maker-profilestars1 - Fetch the user profile from Super Mario Maker game.
  • Steam Database - Serie of tools to Steam data. Website.
  • Steam Web API - Query tool from Steam.
  • vgchartzScrapestars48 - Crawler from VGChartz.
  • Steam Spy - Game statistical from Steam users profiles.

    • Artificial Intelligence

  • Vindiniumstars0 - Multi-player turn based on roguelike competition. Documentation.

    • Artificial Intelligence

    Web

  • Diggerstars46 - Boulderdash game. Play.

    • Dataset

  • Data Game ClashRoyale - Player data of Clash Royale game.

    • Miscellaneous

  • AWS Datasets - Amazon public datasets.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Mar 18th - Mar 24th, 2019
item.description:
API

  • metacritc - Game reviews and evaluation.
  • BoardGameGeek - Board games data.
  • PokéAPI - Pokémon data of all generations.
  • smm-course-viewerstars11 - Read courses from Super Mario Maker saves.

    • Artificial Intelligence

    Web

  • Duck Huntstars397 - Shooting game in ducks. Play.
  • Starship - Traditional starship game. Play.
  • WebNES - Play rooms of NES in web browser. Play.

    • Dataset

  • Clash royale Dataset - Cards data.
  • FIFA 18 Complete Player Dataset - Players and their attributes.
  • Fortnite: Battle Royale - Weapon Attributes - Stats of the weapons.
  • GOSU.AI Dota 2 Game Chats - Chats from matches replays.
  • Hearthstone Cards - Collection of cards.
  • LCS 2017 Summer Split Fantasy Player & Team Stats - Player and team data.
  • Magic The Gathering Cards - Cards data.
  • Oldschool Runescape Polling Data - Historical polling data.
  • Overwatch - Heros characteristics.
  • Overwatch Game Records - Stats of one player from thousands of matches.
  • Overwatch Ranked Data - Player and match data.
  • Pokemon- Weedle's Cave - Battle data of Pokemon.
  • Predict'em All - Pokemon appear in PokemonGo over time.
  • PUBG Match Deaths and Statistics - Matches data.
  • SkillCraft-StarCraft - StarCraft 2 league-level performance.
  • StarCraft II matches history - Results of matches.
  • Super Trunfo - Dinossaurs 2 - Cards of this game.
  • Terra Mystica Snellman Statistics - Game logs and statistics.
  • Travian buildings - Time, cost and bonus of buildings.
  • World of Warcraft Battlegrounds - Details of battlegrounds.
  • Pokemon with stats - Pokemon data with stats and types.

    • Dataset

    Related

  • Video Game Sales with Ratings - Video game sales and rating from metacritc.

item.title: leomaurodesenv/game-datasets Mar 11th - Mar 17th, 2019
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Open HTML5 Games - JavaScript and HTML5 games. Play.

    • API

  • OpenDota - Platform providing Dota 2 data.

    • Artificial Intelligence

  • Dungeon and Cave Generationstars9 - Constructive generation methods for dungeons and levels.
  • irrlambstars23 - Puzzle game with physics effects in 3D.
  • Robocode - Robot battle tank competition.
